title: Expense Tracker
description: A full stack finance dashboard built with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Track expenses, income, and assets with real-time charts and stats.
bullets: Full-stack personal finance dashboard with complete CRUD functionality
Real-time analytics — net worth, savings rate, time-based filtering, recurring entries
Data visualizations including 7-day income vs spending chart and category breakdowns

title: Digit Classifier
description: Trained a CNN from scratch on 60k images achieving 99.2% accuracy. Exported to ONNX and deployed in the browser — draw a digit, get a real-time prediction.
bullets: CNN trained in PyTorch on MNIST dataset — 99.2% test accuracy on 60,000+ images
Interactive React app where users draw digits and get real-time confidence scores
Exported to ONNX for in-browser inference — no server needed

title: Mercari Clone
description: Mercari-inspired marketplace app built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Browse listings, view item details, and list items for sale.
bullets: Product browsing, item detail pages, and responsive UI components
Item listing functionality — create and manage products for sale

title: This Website
description: Personal portfolio designed and built from scratch. Interactive hero with scramble text, split layout terminal, and animated sections throughout.
bullets: Scramble text reveal and split hero with live typing terminal component
Zero CSS files — styled entirely with Tailwind utility classes
Auto-deploys to Vercel on every push to main
